trackingsummarydata.subject: This week in A&S: Navy honors, dirty dishes, music and film
trackingsummarydata.title: FSSG - 12/08/25

urls.page_title: Spaceflight-tested menstrual cup offers choice on long missions | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: To equip astronauts with health choices for future missions, a Cornell postdoctoral fellow is leading research with AstroCup, a group that recently tested two menstrual cups in spaceflight as payload on an uncrewed rocket flight.
urls.page_title: Grants to support research at nexus of AI, climate science | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: New grant funding will support eight research projects seeking to reduce AI’s energy use and integrate AI in environmental research.
urls.page_title: Ancient dirty dishes reveal decades of questionable findings | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: An interdisciplinary team of researchers determined that organic residues of plant oils are poorly preserved in calcareous soils from the Mediterranean, leading decades of archaeologists to likely misidentify olive oil in ceramic artifacts.
urls.page_title: [NEW TIME] Cornell Concerto Competition Finals (CU Music) - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
Concerto Competition Finals: students compete for the opportunity to perform as soloists with the Cornell Symphony Orchestra, the Cornell Chamber Orchestra, and the Cornell Wind Symphony.
photo credit: Noel Heaney
urls.page_title: Cornell Chorus & Glee Club: Lessons & Carols (CU Music) - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
Cornell University Lessons and Carols sung by the Cornell University Chorus and Glee Club, interspersed with traditional readings by members of the Cornell community.
Note: doors will open at 6:30pm. There is no indoor waiting area at Sage Chapel...

Join the Department of Performing and Media Arts for the Student Film Screening, on Friday, December 12, at 5:00 p.m., in the Kiplinger Theatre, Schwartz Center for Performing Arts. The Student Film Screening will feature unique, empathetic, and c...
urls.page_title: The College of Arts & Sciences, Cornell University
urls.page_summary: Liberal arts college at Cornell University. A home for exploration, discovery and imagination. Undergraduate, faculty excellence in research and education. Academic diversity in the humanities, biological sciences and discipline-based education.
urls.page_title: Cornell Navy ROTC midshipman earns top honor | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: Kylie Williamson ’26 has been named Navy/Marines Student of the Year by Navy Federal Credit Union, a top honor in the Reserve Officers Training Corps system. Williamson is the first Cornell student to win the award.
urls.page_title: Peter K. Enns | Department of Government
